title: Public tool surface remains exactly nine read-only tools
text: Fixture evidence that the Augnes Console public app exposes only the intended nine tools and asserts read-only, non-destructive, closed-world annotations for each public tool.

title: Working View fixture is read from a local file
text: Fixture evidence that file mode reads get_working_view from AUGNES_WORKING_VIEW_FILE without writing to disk or making the ChatGPT thread canonical memory.

title: Casefile fixture is read from a local file
text: Fixture evidence that file mode reads open_casefile from AUGNES_CASEFILE_FILE while unresolved real read paths remain mock-backed.

title: Augnes HTTP API is not finalized
text: Fixture evidence noting that file-backed reads are an interim seam until the Augnes Core HTTP read contract is finalized.

title: Augnes Console public read-only app casefile
text: Fixture casefile index record for the Augnes Console public app. The detailed casefile is served by open_casefile from AUGNES_CASEFILE_FILE in file mode.

title: Read-first v1 boundary
text: Fixture boundary index record for the read-first public app profile. It is searchable and fetchable but does not promote or mutate boundary state.

title: File-backed adapter source pointer
text: Fixture repo index record pointing to src/adapters/file-core.ts. Repo search and explore remain view-only; fetchable records are still read-only evidence candidates.
